\tzpentry{ID3662}{Recon Quantum State Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3662 introduces Recon Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} |\Psi_{\text{recon}}\rangle = \mathcal{R}[S_{\text{obs}}] = \arg\min_{|\Psi\rangle} \|S[\mathcal{F}(|\Psi\rangle)] - S_{\text{obs}}\|_2^2 \end{equation}
